channel.title: Space Invaders on Dijure | Digital Architectures with a hint of Java

item.title: KubeInvaders
item.description:
Adopting chaos engineering strategies for your production environment is useful, because it is the only way to test if a system supports unexpected destructive events. – KubeInvaders

KubeInvaders is a lighthearted, gamified way of learning chaos engineering on Kubernetes. It’s like Space Invaders but the aliens are the Pods. The game was created by Eugenio Marzo .

In this lab, you will learn how to:

    ☐ Install KubeInvaders onto Kubernetes
    ☐ Experiment with Pods and resilience
    ☐ Play!
